source_command: manual closeout after external uploaded review current-code crosscheck
summary: Recorded one follow-up from the uploaded review current-code crosscheck closeout: the default check target writes registry evidence after freshness verification, so release evidence still needs a post-check finalizer pass to leave canonical closeout artifacts converged.

observations.problem: The default make check lane runs artifact-freshness-check before registry-preflight, and registry-preflight updates canonical registry evidence. Operators then need a separate manual release-evidence refresh to leave closeout, dashboard, generated-index, and artifact-freshness reports in a final converged state.
observations.why_it_matters: A release readiness task can have all gates passing but still require manual command ordering to avoid stale closeout or source_tree_coherence attention immediately after validation.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a bounded post-check release evidence finalizer target, or teach release-closeout-fixed-point to optionally run after check with only the report writers affected by check-side canonical evidence updates.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-10 KST: `ops/scripts/release_closeout_fixed_point.py --dry-run` now writes a non-mutating post-check report that compares tracked release artifacts against the last fixed-point digest map, current source-tree fingerprint, and artifact-freshness records. `make release-closeout-post-check-finalizer-dry-run` surfaces the affected paths and recommended targets, `make check-finalized` runs `make check` followed by the dry-run and mutating `release-closeout-fixed-point`, and `release-evidence-closeout` now emits the dry-run immediately before the finalizer.
